activities.name: Does WebhookFiles Result files exists
activities.description: Checks there are files to process. If there are it will succeeds and carry on, if not it fails with custom failure message

activities.name: Does WebhookFiles User files exists
activities.description: Checks there are files to process. If there are it will succeeds and carry on, if not it fails with custom failure message

properties.description: Extracts the Rooms from the Polestar DB on AH2, to a table in Avery DB on AH2
Copies data from the view in Polestar to Avery DB. Lists all rooms in CH and the active resident record assigned to that home

activities.name: Refresh Data
activities.description: Truncates table in Avery DB and Inserts data from Polestar DB using the view.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
    [ROOM_REF]
    ,[ROOM_CODE]
    ,[ROOM_DESC]
    ,[USEFLAG]
    ,[HOME_REF]
    ,[RES_REF]
    ,[RES_CODE]
    ,[ResidentStatus]
    ,[Firstname]
    ,[Surname]
    ,[AdmissionAnalysis]
    ,[AdmissionType]
    ,[ResidentAdmissionReason]
    ,[AnalysisGroup]
    ,ResidentsAssigned
FROM 
    [dbo].[vRoomsWithInHomeResidentDetails]
ORDER BY
    Home_Ref ASC,
    ROOM_Ref ASC

activities.name: Update Room Occupancy
activities.description: Updates the Pricing.Room tables occupancy using the refreshed data

activities.name: Get MCM Data
activities.description: Get the MCM data via Azure function

properties.description: Get data from the supplied endpoint (query/report) for the supplied community ID
Executes procedures that create or alter views each day.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT  [PayLines_id]
      ,[comment]
      ,[entry_type]
      ,[variant]
      ,[user_id]
      ,[duration_in_minutes]
      ,[start_datetime]
      ,CAST([start_datetime] AS DATE) AS [start_date]
      ,[end_datetime]
      ,CAST([end_datetime] AS DATE) AS [end_date]
      ,[is_sleep]
      ,[shift_id]
      ,[pay_type]
      ,[rate_of_pay_id]
      ,TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(rate, '£', ''), ',', '') AS decimal(10,2)) AS rate
      ,[rate_of_pay_pay_type]
  FROM [Sona].[STG_PayLines]

transformations.name: EmployeeUpsertCondition
transformations.description: Upsert condition set to always be true so all fields are updated with latest values and any new records are inserted. The Key column used to check for upsert is the EmployeeNumber and is set on the sink task and

scriptLines: dateStarted = case(substring(dateStarted, 5, 2) > substring(toString(year(currentUTC())), 3, 2), '19' + substring(dateStarted, 5, 2) + '-' + substring(dateStarted, 3, 2) + '-' + substring(dateStarted, 1, 2), '20' + substring(dateStarted, 5, 2) + '-' + substring(dateStarted, 3, 2) + '-' + substring(dateStarted, 1, 2)),
